judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis and trading at a high forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 17.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY, with analyst estimates for current FY at 43.5%.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.59B indicates strong cash generation from operations.
Consensus analyst rating is 'buy' with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Operating margin of -33.2% and Profit margin of -28.4% indicate unprofitability.
Return on equity of -53.9% and Return on assets of -9.9% show poor returns on capital.
Forward P/E of 67.73x is very high, suggesting high growth expectations are priced in.
Debt/Equity ratio of 142.46% indicates significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Snowflake (SNOW) is seeing positive analyst commentary ahead of its Q1 earnings report, with RBC Capital highlighting strong checks and adoption of its Cortex Code as potential drivers for an upside surprise. The company's next earnings date is May 27th, presenting an imminent catalyst for the stock. Traders should consider the analyst sentiment and the potential for a beat against current estimates.

headlines.title: Uncover the Charm of La Crosse, Wisconsin: A Perfect Retirement Spot with Scenic Views
Snowflake (SNOW)’s Q1 Upside Likely Given Strong Checks And Ramping Cortex Code Adoption, Says RBC Capital
